snippet.title: MAN UNITED 3-3 EVERTON | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
Dominic Calvert-Lewin rescued a late point for Everton at Old Trafford to make it seven away games without defeat. Carlo Ancelotti's side found themselves 2-0 down at half-time via goals from Edinson Cavani and Bruno Fernandes, but Abdoulaye DoucourГ© and James Rodriguez struck after the break. Scott McTominay thought he'd won it for Manchester United, until Calvert-Lewin steered home his 13th Premier League goal of the season in the 95th minute.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвҖҷs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram

About HBO Max: 
HBO Max is WarnerMediaвҖҷs direct-to-consumer offering with 10,000 hours of curated premium content. HBO Max offers powerhouse programming for everyone in the home, bringing together HBO, a robust slate of new original series, key third-party licensed programs and movies, and fan favorites from WarnerMediaвҖҷs rich library including Warner Bros., New Line, DC, CNN, TNT, TBS, truTV, Turner Classic Movies, Cartoon Network, Adult Swim, Crunchyroll, Rooster Teeth, Looney Tunes and more. #HBOMax #WarnerMedia

Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: Zuma-Malema meeting I Julius Malema arrives in Nkandla
snippet.description:
Former President Jacob Zuma is expected to meet EFF leader Julius Malema today. The meeting comes at Malema's request after he took to Twitter asking the former President for time to chat over tea.
Some are speculating Malema will try and convince Zuma to appear at the State Capture Commission after Zuma said he would not cooperate with the Inquiry. Julius Malema has just arrived in Nkandla.
Our reporter Samkele Maseko is at Nkandla lets cross to him for more.

For more news, visit sabcnews.com and also #SABCNews #Coronavirus #COVID19News on Social Media.

snippet.title: DOELPUNTRIJKE SLOTFASE! рҹҳұ | Leicester City vs Liverpool | Premier League 2020/21 | Samenvatting
snippet.description:
Goals en highlights van Leicester City FC - Liverpool FC gespeeld in de Premier League op 13/02/2021. Bekijk alle doelpunten en hoogtepunten in de samenvatting van deze Engelse competitiewedstrijd. вҮЁ Abonneer je nu op het YouTube kanaal van Ziggo Sport voor meer video's вҮЁ http://bit.ly/2Q03IYg

Landskampioen Liverpool dat met maar liefst 18 punten voorsprong kampioen is geworden is the one to beat dit seizoen! Na dertig jaar wist Liverpool eindelijk weer de titel te pakken. Kunnen zij de titel ook dit jaar binnen halen? Of wordt het toch Manchester City, Manchester United of Chelsea met o.a. Hakim Ziyech? En hoe vergaat het Donny van der Beek bij zijn nieuwe club Manchester United?

De Premier League is dit seizoen spannender dan ooit! Volg het ook dit jaar weer allemaal live bij Ziggo Sport op kanaal 14!

Voor alle samenvattingen en interviews uit alle competities kun je kijken op ZiggoSport.nl вҮЁ http://bit.ly/ZiggoSportPL

snippet.title: 'There was no agenda': Malema and Zuma meet up for tea at Nkandla
snippet.description: EFF leader Julius Malema visited former President Jacob Zuma at his Nkandla homestead on 5 February 2021. The comes after Malema tweeted Zuma, asking to have a sit down with him. EFF spokesperson Vuyani Pambo briefed the media after the meeting.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong вҖ“ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
В 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong,вҖқ the next epic adventure in LegendaryвҖҷs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in вҖңGodzilla vs. KongвҖқ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansвҖ”instigated by unseen forcesвҖ”is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander SkarsgГҘrd (вҖңBig Little Lies,вҖқ вҖңThe Little Drummer GirlвҖқ), Millie Bobby Brown (вҖңStranger ThingsвҖқ), Rebecca Hall (вҖңChristine,вҖқ вҖңProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenвҖқ), Brian Tyree Henry (вҖңJoker,вҖқ вҖңSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseвҖқ), Shun Oguri (вҖңWeathering with YouвҖқ), Eiza GonzГЎlez (вҖңFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawвҖқ), Julian Dennison (вҖңDeadpool 2вҖқ), with Kyle Chandler (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ) and DemiГЎn Bichir (вҖңThe Nun,вҖқ вҖңThe Hateful EightвҖқ).
Wingard (вҖңThe Guest,вҖқ вҖңYouвҖҷre NextвҖқ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (вҖңThor: RagnarokвҖқ) and Max Borenstein (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңKong: Skull IslandвҖқ), story by Terry Rossio (вҖңPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesвҖқ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), based on the character вҖңGodzillaвҖқ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (вҖңThe Mummy,вҖқ вҖңWorld War ZвҖқ), production designers Owen Paterson (вҖңJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,вҖқ вҖңGodzillaвҖқ) and Thomas S. Hammock (вҖңBlair WitchвҖқ), editor Josh Schaeffer (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), costume designer Ann Foley (вҖңSkyscraperвҖқ) and visual effects supervisor John вҖңDJвҖқ DesJardin (upcoming вҖңZack SnyderвҖҷs Justice LeagueвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong.вҖқ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

Welcome to the official home of Chelsea Football Club on YouTube. ItвҖҷs the only channel where youвҖҷll get an authentic look at life at this great club. Every week weвҖҷll be uploading fresh content from the training ground, our famous stadium and much, much more. Founded in 1905, Chelsea Football Club has a rich history, with its many successes including 5 Premier League titles, 8 FA Cups and 1 Champions League, secured on a memorable night in 2012. Famous former Blues include Peter Osgood, Gianfranco Zola, Frank Lampard, John Terry, Didier Drogba & Eden Hazard.

The OneFootball x 442oons show is back with 6 ways to fix Liverpool! After losing 4-1 to Man City, Jurgen Klopp calls on Man United's Harry Maguire for some defensive advice, makes plans to move Fabinho and Henderson back into midfield, tries to get Salah, Mane and Firmino firing again, plus hatches a plan to bring the fans back to Anfield! Can Liverpool be SAVED before their big clashes with Leicester City in the Premier League and RB Leipzig in the UEFA Champions League?

snippet.title: Al Ahly v Palmeiras | FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 | Match Highlights
snippet.description:
CAF Champions League kings Al Ahly SC recorded a penalty shoot-out win over Copa Libertadores winners SE Palmeiras in the FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 match for third place. Mohamed El Shenaway saved two penalties in the shootout as the Egyptian side marked their best finish at the Club World Cup since 2006.

snippet.title: AUBA WITH A HAT-TRICK! | Arsenal vs Leeds (4-2) | Premier League
snippet.description:
Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang claimed his first-ever Premier League hat-trick as we returned to winning ways in an action-packed match.
 
Making his first start for a month, the skipper led the line superbly at centre forward, taking his tally to 11 for the season in the process.
 
But we had to see off a late Leeds fightback, who struck twice in the second half when we appeared to be cruising at 4-0 up.
 
We were good value for the points though, having looked lively from the very start. Emile Smith Rowe and Hector Bellerin both had shots off target before we took the lead.
 
Despite making five changes, the side was gelling well, and it was a nice move that led to the opener. Gabriel, Emile Smith Rowe and Granit Xhaka were involved but all the hard work was done by Aubameyang. He cut in from the left, beat his man then wrong footed the keeper with a low finish inside the near post.
 
The skipper had a great chance to double the lead following a marauding run from David Luiz into the box. He picked out Aubameyang with the cut back, but his shot was well blocked by Luke Ayling to deflect the shot over the bar.
 
Wonderful play between Martin Odegaard and Bukaya Saka looked to have won us a penalty, when the latter was bundled over inside the area. Referee Stuart Attwell pointed to the spot, but somewhat surprisingly, his decision was overturned after VAR intervention.
 
Justice was done shortly afterwards when Saka was again brought down in the box, this time by keeper Illan Meslier, who tripped him after being closed down. Aubameyang made no mistake from 12 yards.
 
We were rampant by now - led by Saka. He made another incisive run into the box before the ball fell to Ceballos, who threaded a pass through a defender's legs into the path of Bellerin to smash home.
 
Aubameyang completed his hat-trick soon after the break, heading home Smith Rowe's floated cross to the far post.
 
As the freezing rain fell, we were enjoying ourselves, with the movement of the forward players a joy to watch.
 
Our progress was checked though when Leeds pulled one back through a powerful header from Pascal Strujik from an outswinging corner.
 
Odegaard had a fierce shot well saved, though replays suggested he was offside anyway.
 
But Leeds were full of running after their goal, and further reduced the arrears when Helder Costa smashed home from Tyler Roberts' cutback.
 
All of a sudden Leeds were on top. Patrick Bamford had a penalty appeal turned down as the visitors ramped up the pressure.
 
At the other end Aubameyang smashed the bar with a superb first-time effort from Granit Xhaka's pass and Saka also struck the upright as the game opened up even more.

#arsenal #aubameyang #premierleague 

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Mesut Ozil, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

Subscribe to the Official Arsenal YouTube Channel: https://arsn.al/youtube
Follow us on Facebook: https://arsn.al/facebook
Follow us on Twitter: https://arsn.al/twitter
Follow us on Instagram: https://arsn.al/instagram
Follow us on TikTok: https://arsn.al/tiktok

This is the Official YouTube channel for Arsenal Football Club.

For more match action, highlights and training videos, make sure you become a digital member and sign up to Arsenal Player. It's FREE and is the Home of the Game: https://arsn.al/arsenalplayer

Arsenal Football Club were formed in 1886 and amassed 13 League titles, 14 FA Cups. Some of their greatest players include: Thierry Henry, Dennis Bergkamp, Tony Adams, Ian Wright, Robert Pires, Liam Brady, Patrick Vieira, Cliff Bastin and Charlie George.

snippet.title: EXTENDED HIGHLIGHTS: MAN UTD 3-3 EVERTON
snippet.description:
Dominic Calvert-Lewin rescued a late point for Everton at Old Trafford to make it seven away games without defeat. Carlo Ancelotti's side found themselves 2-0 down at half-time via goals from Edinson Cavani and Bruno Fernandes, but Abdoulaye DoucourГ© and James Rodriguez struck after the break. Scott McTominay thought he'd won it for Manchester United, until Calvert-Lewin steered home his 13th Premier League goal of the season in the 95th minute.

Subscribe to Everton Football Club's official YouTube Channel: http://bit.ly/2wtCEbB

Follow us on Facebook: http://facebook.com/everton
Follow us on Twitter: http://twitter.com/everton
Follow us on Instagram: http://instagram.com/everton

Welcome to the Official Everton Football Club YouTube channel. We'll offer fans real insight into life at Goodison Park, USM Finch Farm and on the road with the Blues.

snippet.title: School Admission - Part 2 (Mark Angel Comedy) (Episode 298)
snippet.description:
Success is seeking admission in a new school as her former school has no more teachers since due to her stubbornness, the headmaster had fired all the school teachers, but for her to be offered admission, she must pass an Oral IQ test. 

His uncle Kbrown is not OK with an oral text as he recommends a written test, but the headmaster insist.

snippet.title: All American 3x04 Promo "My Mind's Playing Tricks on Me" (HD)
snippet.description:
All American 3x04 "My Mind's Playing Tricks on Me" Season 3 Episode 4 Promo - SELF-DISCOVERY - Following Layla's (Greta Onieogou) advice to see a therapist, Spencer (Daniel Ezra) tries to get to the root of his problem, which leads to a shocking revelation. Jordan (Michael Evans Behling) grows concerned about Simone's (guest star Geffri Maya) behavior, but when he learns the reason why, he tries to be supportive in the way she needs. Even though Asher (Cody Christian) is still suspended, he tries to prove himself to Montes (guest star Alexandra Barreto) and earn a potential place somehow on the team. Meanwhile, Coop (Bre-Z) wants to make a music video and turns to the community to help, while Layla and her dad face off about Patience (Chelsea Tavares). Taye Diggs, Monet Mazur, Samantha Logan and Karimah Westbrook also star. Kelli Williams directed the episode written by Jameal Turner. (#304). Original airdate 2/8/2021. Subscribe to tvpromosdb on Youtube for more All American season 3 promos in HD!

snippet.title: Isaiah Song (feat. Chandler Moore) - Maverick City | TRIBL
snippet.description:
Official Music Video for "Isaiah Song" featuring Chandler Moore by Maverick City Music. 

"Isaiah Song" was written by Chandler Moore, Leamond Sloan, and Benita Jones. This video was captured by Maverick City at a live recording in 2020 at 1971 Sounds in Atlanta before COVID and safety restrictions were in place for larger gatherings. 

"Isaiah Song" from Maverick City Music Vol 3, part 2 is available everywhere you listen to music!

snippet.title: Dodge Challenger Demon v Porsche 911 Turbo S - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

ItвҖҷs time for an almighty USA vs Germany drag race! 

MatвҖҷs in the absolutely huge Dodge Challenge Demon, and heвҖҷs lining up against Yianni in the Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

When you compare them on paper, it looks like the Dodge has it in the bag. With a humungous 6.2-litre supercharged V8 under its massive bonnet, the Challenge Demon can put down 808hp and 972Nm! As a result, it seemingly dwarfs the 911 Turbo S, which has a 3.8-litre twin-turbo flat-six, which can produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

But of course, this isnвҖҷt the first time weвҖҷve driven a Porsche 911 Turbo S on this channel, and we know youвҖҷre pretty much guaranteed a 1/4 mile time of less than 10.5 seconds! 

So how do you think this will play out? Will the Dodge be able to put its power down? Or is the Porsche set to grab another victory? 

YouвҖҷll have to keep watching to find out!

Thanks to CS Panda for lending us the Dodge - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxwBVsAoWWkQjKmSKOx5u2A

snippet.title: "KUWTK" Final Season Begins This March on E! | E!
snippet.description:
After 14 years, Kim, Khloe, Kourtney, Kendall, Kylie, Rob, Scott & Kris are saying goodbye to "Keeping Up With the Kardashians." The final season premieres Thursday, March 18, only on E!

snippet.title: House Votes To Impeach And McConnell Provides Cover For GOP Senators To Break With The President
snippet.description:
For Americans eager to hold the president accountable for inciting a violent mob to attack Congress, Wednesday brought key glimmers of hope as the House of Representatives voted in favor of impeachment and a comment by Majority Leader Mitch McConnell appeared to give cover for Republican Senators to do the same when the trial begins in that chamber. #Colbert #Impeachment #Monologue

Evolve's BMW M5 is BACK, and it's going up against three rallycross superstars! 

We've all seen what this incredible M5 can do, with its tuned 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 able to produce 1000hp! As for the rallycars? Well, none of them can match the power of the M5, with the lead competitor being the MINI with a 2-litre turbocharged petrol engine that can put down 600hp & 1,000Nm! 

However, the M5 has one major disadvantage compared to the competition... It weighs in at 2 tonnes, while all three rallycross cars come in at just 1,300kg! 

So what do you think - is the M5 now the underdog?! Mat & Yianni have joined forces to see if they can take down these superstars, and all we know is, this race isn't to be missed!! 

.............................................................

snippet.title: India lower order frustrates Aussies with Test evenly poised | Vodafone Test Series 2020-21
snippet.description:
A 123-run partnership between Washington Sundar and Shardul Thakur saw India bowled out just 33 runs short of Australia's first innings, with Josh Hazlewood claiming a five-wicket haul, before Australia's openers extended their lead to 54 by stumps.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: How does Alisson make the same mistake TWICE vs. Manchester City? | ESPN FC
snippet.description:
ESPN FC's Steve Nicol, Frank Leboeuf anf Shaka Hislop dive into Liverpool's 1-4 loss to Manchester City in the Premier League. Nicol believes the best team won the match, and says Liverpool's lone goal was a gift. Leboeuf says a lot of good players made mistakes for Liverpool, and thinks Man City made the reigning champions pay the price for their risky play. Hislop says Allison "showed us he was human" against Manchester City, citing Klopp's tactics of playing out from the back as the reason for their downfall in the game.

вң” Subscribe to ESPN+: http://espnplus.com/soccer/youtube
вң” Subscribe to ESPN FC on YouTube: http://bit.ly/SUBSCRIBEtoESPNFC

snippet.title: Mike Dean asks not to officiate in the Premier League this weekend due to abuse received online
snippet.description:
в–ә Subscribe to Sky Sports News: http://bit.ly/SkySportsNewsSub

Mike Dean has asked not to officiate a Premier League game this weekend after receiving abuse and death threats on social media after handing out two controversial red cards.

The news comes out as West Ham won their appeal over Tomas Soucek red card during Saturday's 0-0 draw at Fulham. Mike Dean will still officiate Wednesday's FA Cup game between Brighton & Leicester.

snippet.title: Uzalo S6 -  Eps 232
snippet.description:
Nosipho learns that she is going to die. Lilly urges Gabisile to confess because her day of reckoning is nigh and Last Number agrees to Nonka selling her snacks at the salon but of course, Ts and Cs apply.
 
Download the free VIU app from your Android Play Store or Apple iStore today. Catch the new season S6 of  Uzalo  at 20:30 ( Mon-Fri) on SABC 1, and here on YouTube at 21:00.

UZALO tells the story of two family dynasties and the two young men who carry their hopes and legacies as they face the complexities of money, family and love. At the heart of this series, a question is asked: In a country with a history as complex and multifaceted as South AfricaГ•s, what are the ties that bind? Is it blood-ties that make up the family unit, or the bonds forged with perfect stranger who often become dearer to us? Catch UzaloвҖҷs free catch-up service in South Africa only on MzansiвҖҷs brand new video streaming service VIU.

Former top Trump administration officials have been lobbying GOP lawmakers to try and convict Trump at his upcoming impeachment trial. CNN's Jamie Gangel reports.

#CNN #News

snippet.title: Corporations halt donations to GOP who voted to overturn elections
snippet.description:
Some of America's biggest companies are suspending donations to Republican Congress members who objected to the Electoral College's votes.
The growing list of those corporations, including BlueCross BlueShield, Citigroup (C), Commerce Bank and Marriott (MAR), comes after a pro-Trump mob breached the US Capitol last Wednesday to fight against the ceremonial counting of electoral votes that confirmed President-elect Joe Biden's win.
147 Republicans voted against certification of the electoral votes in a joint session of Congress last Wednesday evening. They included Missouri Sen. Josh Hawley, Kansas Sen. Roger Marshall, Texas Sen. Ted Cruz and Alabama Sen. Tommy Tuberville, among hundreds other congress members.
"At the Blue Cross Blue Shield Association, we continuously evaluate our political contributions to ensure that those we support share our values and goals," said Kim Keck, BlueCross BlueShield's president and CEO, in a statement. "In light of this week's violent, shocking assault on the United States Capitol, and the votes of some members of Congress to subvert the results of November's election by challenging Electoral College results, BCBSA will suspend contributions to those lawmakers who voted to undermine our democracy."
The health insurance company's BLUEPAC political action committee -- supported only by employee contributions -- donated $246,750 to Republican lawmakers during the 2020 cycle. That included $10,000 to Sen. Tuberville, $1,000 to Sen. Marshall and $500 to Sen. Hawley.
BlueCross BlueShield said it's stopping donations to all 147 Republicans who challenged the Electoral College results.
#CNN #ChristineRomans #FirstMove
